hero.title: Tools to help you
hero.description: Track your mood. Take your medicine on time. Practice helpful exercises. Connect with people who understand. All in one safe place.

tools.sectionTitle: Simple tools that help every day
tools.sectionDesc: Each tool is easy to use. You can use one tool or all of them. Go at your own speed.
tools.tool1Desc: Log how you feel each day. See your patterns over time. Share your progress with your doctor.
tools.tool2Desc: Get reminders to take your medicine. Track what you take. Note any side effects.
tools.tool3Desc: Step-by-step exercises to help with difficult thoughts and feelings. Based on therapies that work.
tools.tool4Desc: Join safe, moderated support groups. Talk with people who understand. You are not alone.
tools.tool5Desc: Create your personal safety plan. Save emergency contacts. Get help quickly when you need it.
tools.tool6Desc: Your doctor can see your progress. Video calls available. Everything is private and secure.

therapies.sectionDesc: These are new ways to help. They are based on science. Your doctor can guide you.
therapies.therapy1Desc: Instead of fighting the voices, you can learn a new way to relate to them. This reduces stress and helps you focus on what matters to you.
therapies.therapy2Desc: Learn to notice and name your feelings. Practice staying calm when emotions feel too big. This helps prevent difficult episodes.
therapies.therapy3Desc: Fun exercises that strengthen your memory, attention, and thinking. Practice real-life skills like shopping and talking with others.
therapies.therapy4Desc: Many people think they can never work again. This therapy helps you gently question these beliefs.

journey.sectionDesc: There is no rush. Every small step counts.
journey.step1Desc: Understand your condition. Take a simple assessment.
journey.step2Desc: Start tracking. Set up reminders. Try your first exercise.
journey.step3Desc: Try new therapies. Join the community. Build confidence.
journey.step4Desc: Live the life you want. Work, learn, connect, help others.

faq.instruction: Click a question to see the answer.
faq.a1: SchizoCare is a free app for people with schizophrenia. It helps you track your mood, remember your medicine, and practice helpful exercises. It was made with doctors who specialize in schizophrenia.
faq.a2: Yes, it is completely free for patients. Nothing is hidden. Doctors pay for their own special dashboard to see your progress.
faq.a3: Yes. All your information is encrypted and private. We follow HIPAA rules in the US and DSGVO rules in Germany. Only you and your doctor can see your data.
faq.q4: Can my doctor use this too?
faq.a4: Yes. Doctors have a special dashboard. They can see your mood and medicine history. This helps them give you better care.

cta.sectionDesc: It is free. It is private. And you can go at your own speed.

create.title: Create Your Avatar
create.intro: Let's create a face for your voice. You're in control.

avatar.empowerment: You created this. You control this. Let's practice together.

hub.title: Grounding
hub.subtitle: Take a moment. You're safe here.

safePlace.title: Safe Place
safePlace.subtitle: A quiet journey to somewhere you feel completely safe.

footer.crisisText: Call 988 (US) or 0800 111 0 111 (Germany). Help is always available.
